summary: Comprehensive testing of Shared Events (Eventos com Amigos) feature and Landing Page enrichment. Backend: 26/26 tests passed covering all CRUD operations, invite/leave/migrate endpoints, participant visibility, and permission controls. Frontend: All new landing page sections verified, EventsPanel loads correctly, event creation/invite flow fully functional.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests. Both indicate auth failure but RFC 7235 recommends 401 for missing credentials.

issues: Features section titles ('Smart Habits', 'Streaks & XP', 'AI Assistant') show in EN when language is set to EN - this is correct behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line ~1476: migrate_local_events - Event ID generation uses index `i` with time and uid[:6] which could collide for rapid batches. Consider using UUID4 for IDs.
useCollaborativeEvents.js: fetchEvents fails silently on refresh errors - consider adding a stale-data indicator so users know when refresh fails after initial load.

EventsPanel.jsx: Invite button is hidden by default (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100) - on mobile/touch devices where hover doesn't work, users may not discover the invite functionality. Consider making it always visible on mobile.
seed_data_creation: Reset gabriela's password to 'Gabriela@123' via admin API for testing. Created test events: 'TEST Gabriela Event' (by gabriela). Test events from backend tests cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared Events feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend all endpoints work: GET /api/events (owner+participant), POST (create), PUT (owner=all fields, participant=review only), DELETE (owner only), POST /invite (owner only, by username), DELETE /leave (participant only), POST /migrate (idempotent). Frontend: EventsPanel uses useCollaborativeEvents hook with /api/events. Invite button (👥) is hover-visible for owners. InviteFriendsModal has search by username via /api/users/search. Gabriela (69c10e9c14f7fc560d56dc78) password was reset to 'Gabriela@123'. Landing page new sections: Screenshots showcase (DashboardMockup, EventsMockup, TARSMockup), SharedEventShowcase, Testimonials - all present and rendering correctly.
